utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each one is fully detailed: (1) destination lists city, country, and region; (2) travel_dates specify exact start and end dates; (3) transportation includes airline, class, airports, times, cost, currency, baggage, and cancellation details; (4) accommodation includes property details, rating, costs, currency, and amenities; (5) activities include name, type, duration, cost, currency, guide, difficulty, and setting; (6) additional_services include dining details and travel insurance; (7) total_budget includes total cost, currency, budget limit, and remaining budget. All are complete and consistent with the requested detail.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following items: destination = Lisbon, Portugal; transportation = Budget Airline (Economy Class); accommodation = Tranquil Inn; activity = Personalized Wellness Session (Astrological Yoga Routine); dining = Local Lisbon Eatery (Local Specialty Bistro). According to the ground-truth ratings: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 7; Budget Airline Economy Class corresponds to 'budget_airlines' → 'Economy Class' which has a rating of 10; Tranquil Inn has a rating of 7; the activity 'Personalized Wellness Session (Astrological Yoga Routine)' is not explicitly listed under activities, but the closest match is 'Yoga Retreat' (both wellness/yoga oriented), which has a rating of 10; and the restaurant 'Local Lisbon Eatery' (Local Specialty) does not exactly match any listed restaurant, but the most general matching category is a local-style restaurant such as 'French Café' or 'Italian Trattoria' with rating 7. Therefore, the mapped ratings are: Lisbon (7), Budget Airline (Economy) (10), Tranquil Inn (7), Personalized Wellness Session (10), Local Lisbon Eatery (7).
